name: Imagination
description: Citrus aromatic created by Jacques Cavallier Belletrud. Citron and bergamot top notes with smoldering black tea and guaiac wood. Bold, contemporary, instantly distinctive.
whyThisFitsMyArchive: Louis Vuitton Imagination balances luxury with restraint. The composition is ambitious without being aggressive—think 'wealthy without announcing it.' Black tea and guaiac wood give unexpected depth.
